verdict_summary: you v2.2.3-REBUILT did NOT fix the #835 regression. APF still drops API connections at network layer (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on /api/logger, /api/payments/migration 404, /api/enterpriseAnalytics 400 ×4) but no Korean warning text ('차단' / '보안 정책') is rendered in the page DOM. Main content area is blank — sidebar UI only. Same regression signature as #835 reproduced exactly: prompt submit redirects to /search?q=... (GET search path) instead of #792's /chat?chatMode=default (POST chat path), and APF on the /search code path no longer injects the HTML intercept page. v2.2.3-REBUILT does not introduce text rendering on /search path.

comparison_to_prior.vs_792_OK_baseline: REGRESSION CONFIRMED — #792 had full-page intercept on /chat?chatMode=default with tab title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' and visible '보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' #864 has none of that.
comparison_to_prior.vs_835_regression: IDENTICAL behavior reproduced — same /search URL path, same blank body (~409 chars), same ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on /api/logger, same lack of warning HTML, same has_block=false. v2.2.3-REBUILT did not fix the regression.

recommendation: INVESTIGATE — v2.2.3-REBUILT does NOT close the #835 regression. Root cause unchanged: APF rule appears to target the legacy /chat?chatMode=default POST path while you.com now routes the initial 'How can I help?' Enter-submit through /search?q=...&fromSearchBar=true&chatMode=default (GET). On the /search path APF only blocks secondary /api/* requests at network layer (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED) but does NOT inject the Korean HTML intercept page. UX is degraded vs #792 baseline (blank chat area instead of explanatory warning). Next step: extend APF rule pattern set to cover the /search?q=... GET path with the same HTML-intercept response that's currently emitted only on /chat path. Verify against both submission flows (search-bar Enter on /chat homepage AND direct /chat POST).
notes: Test PC: Windows 11, Chrome (focused window). v2.2.3-REBUILT verification for ticket #864. Procedure: (1) Opened new Chrome tab, navigated to https://you.com/. (2) Page auto-redirected to https://you.com/chat?chatMode=default (logged in from prior session). (3) Closed Google Translate popup. (4) Clicked 'How can I help?' input. (5) Typed PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?' and pressed Enter. (6) URL transitioned to /search?q=...&fromSearchBar=true&chatMode=default. (7) Waited 15s. Main content area stayed blank — only sidebar UI visible plus 'Ask a follow-up...' input (so the chat shell DID transition state but no message rendered). (8) Opened DevTools (F12). Console showed: routeToApi AxiosError Network Error, /api/logger ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED, /api/payments/migration 404, /api/enterpriseAnalytics 400 ×4, total 7 errors / 92 warnings. (9) Ran console eval: JSON.stringify({title,url,has_block,has_security,has_warning,has_rrn,body_len,body_excerpt}) → {has_block:false, has_security:false, has_warning:false, has_rrn:true (URL reflection only), body_len:409}. Reproduces #835 exactly; v2.2.3-REBUILT does not resolve.
